meta.name: npm Ecosystem — Dependency Graph + Stack Overflow Attention (d4)
meta.experiment: DISC_D4_SOFTWARE_v1 — d4 observer layer in software
meta.data_source: npm registry API (registry.npmjs.org) + Stack Overflow API (api.stackexchange.com)

layers.dependency: d1: directed edge A->B if package A lists B in its dependencies
layers.reverse_dependency: d2: same edges viewed as B←A; in-degree = number of packages depending on B
layers.stack_overflow_attention: d4: co-attention layer connecting top-30 packages by SO question count
